message:
feat: add wisp deletion and stale issue auto-close to reaper

The wisp reaper previously only closed stale wisps but never deleted them,
causing unbounded row accumulation (~5-10K/day). This adds:

- DELETE pass: removes closed wisp rows older than 7 days from all wisp
  tables (wisps, wisp_labels, wisp_comments, wisp_events, wisp_dependencies)
  in batches of 100 to avoid long-running Dolt transactions
- Digest summary: logs aggregate stats by wisp_type before deletion
- Stale issue auto-close: closes issues >30 days with no status change,
  with close_reason 'stale:auto-closed by reaper', exempting P0/P1
- Configurable delete_age and stale_issue_age via daemon.json

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
